description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
OR an All-Star Game is on the schedule
AND FOX broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in Canada
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the game level blackedOutVideo = true
AND the AWAY (National) feed level foxAuthRequired = true
AND the HOME (International) feed level foxAuthRequired = false

steps.action:
WHEN the user views a FOX Postseason game tile
OR the user views a FOX All-Star Game tile
steps.result:
THEN the MVPD pill does not display in the lower left corner of the game tile
AND the Blackout pill displays in the lower left corner of the game tile
